description: CompositionBlue t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a round neck, short sleeves and sponsor name in graphic print witth nike swoosh on the front FittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wetCool iron, but do not iron on designDo not dry cleanStand up and support Team India - the ICC world champions – in this cricket t-shirt from nike. This Team India tee is designed for the die-hard cricket fan who loves to flaunt the country’s glory. Team this with track pants and sports shoes for absolute comfort.
